mapper.sql: id, achievement_id, author_id, author_code, author_name, author_type, author_unit_name, author_ranking, work_ratio, is_first, author_unit_id, authordivision_id, sex, edu_level, edu_degree, title, note
mapper.select:
select saa.id as rowId, saa.author_id as authorId, puser.name as authorName, saa.author_type as authorType, ccspt.name as authorTypeName, saa.author_code as authorCode, saa.sex as sex, case when saa.sex=0 then '女' when saa.sex=1 then '男' else '' END as sexName, saa.edu_degree as eduDegree,csed.name as eduDegreeName, saa.edu_level as eduLevel,csel.name as eduLevelName, saa.title as title,ccsti.name as titleName, sauthororder.code as authorRanking,sauthororder.name as authorRankingName, saa.work_ratio as workRatio
from srm_achievement_author saa left join ct_srm_user puser on puser.id=saa.author_id left join ct_srm_person_type ccspt on ccspt.code=saa.author_type left join ct_srm_title_info ccsti on ccsti.code=saa.title left join ct_srm_edu_degree csed on csed.code=saa.edu_degree left join ct_srm_edu_level csel on csel.code=saa.edu_level left join ct_srm_paper_author_order sauthororder on sauthororder.code=saa.author_ranking where saa.achievement_id=#{parentId}
